name: BesoGo

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a lightweight, dependency-free SGF game-record viewer or editor with branches, comments, and board markup instead of hand-written SVG, which fails to keep the game tree, coordinates, and responsive board in sync. Do not use it for online play, clocks, or AI position evaluation.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally output only SGF parenthesis notation or a static board, not reliable branch navigation, comments, markup, and game-record editing. BesoGo closes the loop between the SGF state tree and an SVG UI with dependency-free JS/CSS.

schema.sgf: string -- complete SGF collection beginning with '(;'; do not inject it as innerHTML, pass it directly to the create options

spec.note: Set resize:'fixed' and give the container an explicit height of 620px. The host supplies the width; do not use vh or percentage heights. By default it shows the control, names, comment, and tree panels.

when_to_use: 需要轻量、零依赖的 SGF 棋谱查看器或编辑器并展示分支、注释与棋盘标记时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生在棋树状态、坐标和响应式棋盘同步上失败;非做在线对弈、计时或 AI 形势判断。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能输出 SGF 括号文本或静态棋盘,无法可靠提供分支导航、注释、标记和棋谱编辑;BesoGo 用零依赖 JS/CSS 把 SGF 状态树与 SVG UI 闭环。
license_note: 本条固定使用 board-flat.css,不加载仓库 img/ 下另有 CC-BY-SA/CC-BY-NC 条款的写实棋子与木纹资产。

data_in._why_no_example: SGF 是 AI 原生记法;besogo.create 的 sgf 选项直接吃完整字符串,schema 足矣、不附 minimal example。

schema.sgf: string —— 完整 SGF collection,从 '(;' 开始;不要作为 innerHTML 注入,直接传给 create 选项

spec.note: 固定 resize:'fixed' 并给容器显式 620px 高;宽度由宿主提供,禁用 vh/百分比高。默认展示 control+names+comment+tree 四个面板。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):从固定 /gh/ commit 顺序加载官方 15 个 classic JS,把 besogo.css + board-flat.css 放 iframe head,再 besogo.create(el,{sgf,...})。
boot.note: picks 未提供 npm/version;上游 release 的单文件资产不在 git 树中,故不用不可审计的 latest/master,而固定已核对 commit 并按仓库 build.sh 的源码顺序加载。

carriers.widget: conditional:repo-only classic 脚本需写 document.head,但组件 DOM 与两张 CSS 落 shadow;fixed resize 避免全局窗口布局假设
carriers.codex: conditional:需允许从 jsDelivr /gh/ 固定 commit 加载多文件 classic JS;使用 flat 主题无图片 CDN

isolation.evidence: 固定 commit 4f03a3a 的 15 个 classic JS + css/besogo.css + css/board-flat.css 均 HTTP 200;besogo.js 定义 window.besogo 且 besogo.create 存在;options.sgf/panels/resize/coord/nowheel 均被源码消费(data_in {sgf} 直传正确)。隔离:运行时不向 document.head 注 <style>(CSS 走外链,widget 落 shadow;boot 的 <script>/<link> 写 head 只是加载机制)→ globalStyleInjection=no;渲染 SVG 进传入元素、无 document.body append → globalDomMutation=no;besogo.js 注册 addEventListener('keydown') 与 window 级监听(棋谱游走导航),classic 单体无 destroy/cleanup API → globalEvents=yes。shadowCompatible=conditional:棋盘 SVG+面板可在 shadow 内渲染,但脚本须全局加载、注册 window.besogo,且全局 keydown 监听逃出 shadow。

minimal.sgf: (;GM[1]FF[4]CA[UTF-8]SZ[19]KM[6.5]RU[Japanese]PB[Black]PW[White]GN[Opening principles demo]C[Corners first: the four 4-4 star points (A-D) are the fastest way to take territory; tengen (circled) is the center. Step through the moves, then open the variation branch in the tree panel.]LB[dd:A][pd:B][dp:C][pp:D]CR[jj];B[pd]C[Move 1: Black takes the top-right star point (hoshi).];W[dp]C[Move 2: White takes the bottom-left to stay balanced.];B[pp]C[Move 3: Black completes a diagonal fuseki, staking out the right side.];W[dd]C[Move 4: White answers in the last empty corner.](;B[fq]LB[fq:A]C[Main line: Black makes a corner approach (kakari) against the bottom-left.];W[cn]C[White answers low along the left side.])(;B[pj]TR[pd][pp]C[Variation: Black plays the right-side star point, linking the two marked stones into a large right-side framework (moyo).]))
